verses.text: Shinar kumpipa Amrafel, Ellasar kumpipa Ariok, Elam kumpipa Khedorlaomer, leh Goiim kumpipa Tidal-te' hun lai-in
hih kumpite in Sodom kumpipa Bera, Gomorrah kumpipa Birsha, Admah kumpipa Shinab, Zeboiim kumpipa Shemeber, leh Bela (Zoar) kumpipa, kumpi ngate va sim uh hi
Hih kumpi ngate in kipawlna bawlin Siddim Kuam (Ci Tuipi)-ah a galkapte uh gawm uh hi
Amaute, kum sawmlenih sung Khedorlaomer' khutnuai--ah om uh a, ahih hangin a kum sawmlethumna ciangin amaute in lehdo uh hi
A kum sawmlelina ciangin Khedorlaomer leh amah tawh a kipawl kumpite hong pai-in sehnel gamgi Elparan ciangdongah Ashteroth—-karnaim gama Refaim, Ham gama Zuzim, Shavehkiriathaim gama Emim
leh amau' gam Seir Mual tunga Hori mite hong zo uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute kihei kikin Enmishpat (Kadesh) -ah hong pai uh a, Amalek mite' gam khempeuh leh Hazazontamar gama teng Amor mite zong zo uh hi
Tua ciangin Sodom kumpipa, Gomorrah kumpipa, Admah kumpipa, Zeboiim kumpipa, leh Bela (Zoar) kumpipa kuankhia uh a, amaute kipawlin Siddim Kuam-ah
Ela kumpipa Khedorlaomer, Goiim kumpipa Tidal, Shinar kumpipa Amrafel, leh Ellasar kumpipa Ariok tawh kido uh a, kumpi li kigawm leh kumpi nga kigawm kido uh hi
Siddim Kuam pen kultal khukte tawh kidim a, Sodom leh Gomorrah kumpite a tai uh ciangin pawlkhat tua khukte sungah kia uh a, a omlai teng mualtungah tai uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin galte in Sodom leh Gomorrah-te' na khempeuh leh a an khempeuh uh la-in a ciah uh hi
Amaute in Sodom-a a teng Lot (Abram' sanggampa' tapa) leh a na khempeuh zong la-in a paikhia uh hi

Tua ciangin a suakta mi khat hong pai-in, Hebru mi Abram' kiangah hong gen hi. Amah pen Eshkol leh Aner' sanggampa ahi hi. Amor mi hi a, Mamre tawsawte gei-ah teng hi. Hih mite pen Abram' kipawlpihte ahi hi
Ama behpa salin a kimatna Abram in a zak ciangin, ama inn sunga a suak, a kihilhsa ama mi zathum leh sawmlegiatte makaihin Dan ciangdong a delhin a pai uh hi
Amah in zan hunin ama pawlte, amah leh a nasemte, amaute a do dingin khenin amaute zo a, Damaskas leilu lam Hobah ciangdong a delh uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in Lot leh ama na khempeuh, numeite leh a galmatte tawh a ciahpih kik hi.
Abram in Khedorlaomer kumpipa leh a pawlte a zawhna panin a ciahkik ciangin amah a dawn dingin Sodom kumpipa Shaveh Kuam (Kumpipa' Kuam)-ah na pai hi
Tua ciangin Jerusalem kumpipa Melkhizedek in an leh leenggahzu hong pusuah hi. Amah pen Sang Pen Pasian' siampi zong ahi hi
Amah in thupha pia a, “Vantung leh leitung a bawl, Sang Pen Pasian in Abram thupha pia hen
Na galte na khutsungah a hong pia Sang Pen Pasian in thupha ngah hen,” a ci hi. Abram in na khempeuh sawmah khat ama tungah a pia hi
Sodom kumpipa in Abram' kiangah, “A mite hong pia in la, ahih hangin a nate nang-a' dingin la in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Abram in Sodom kumpipa kiangah, “Vantung leh leitung a bawl Sang Pen Topa Pasian tungah ka kiciam khinzo hi
Nangmah in, ‘Abram ka hausak hi,’ ci khading na hih manin mimkhau ahi a, khedap khau ahi a, nangma-a' ahi na khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin ka la kei ding hi
Tangvalte' neksate leh kei tawh hong kuan mite' tahn dingte lobuang bangmah ka la kei ding hi. Aner, Eshkol, leh Mamre-te amau' tanh ding pia in,” a ci hi.
